docket_entries.description: HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES, PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF IPAC, ERLINDA HEARING SET FOR DEC-03-2008 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT PIRA, RICHARD ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO CRC 3.50 - 3.63

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON DEC-03-2008 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/PLAINTIFF ERLINDA IPAC'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT GRANTED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY GIVEN TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON; CLERK: D. LOK/E. BURA; REPORTER: SUSAN LEE CSR# 4280 (D206)
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF IPAC, ERLINDA AS TO DEFENDANT PIRA, RICHARD SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF IPAC, ERLINDA SERVED NOV-17-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PIRA, RICHARD
